svg.text: Each layer: one .bicep + one .parameters.json deployed via GitHub Actions
Parent policy — DNS proxy, threat intel, SNAT
Landing zone subscription — per app team
NIC-level grouping for NSG source/dest rules
Ingress: AFD → PLS → ILB → VM (Microsoft backbone — never traverses hub firewall)
Egress: VM → vHub → Azure Firewall → Internet (routing intent enforced)
TLS: AFD terminates client cert · re-encrypts HTTPS to backend · min TLS 1.2
Deployment pattern — every module follows this tandem
New region: add hub entry to vwan.parameters.json only — no template changes
New app: add parameters/{appName}/ folder with two JSON files, raise PR — platform team reviews and merges
New DNS zone: add zone + VNet link + A records to privateDNS.parameters.json only
